name: bugate
description: Agentic QA governance kit / SDTD gate engine: pre-code gates, auditable lifecycle-role handoffs, first-class imported-mode updates, hash-linked evidence, strict Memory transitions, dual-runtime peer bridges, and physical write guards. Fresh installs use bugate_init.py; existing installations use bugate-update. Inert until the project carries a committed bugate.config.yaml.
